name: Sidebar Feynman link opens the page without a 404
description: After login, clicking the Feynman Mode link in the sidebar navigates to a page that renders its content (no 404, no blank screen). This established account sees no onboarding tour.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Click the Feynman Mode link in the Study section of the sidebar
Verify the Feynman Mode page loaded — it shows a heading or a text-input/topic area, NOT a 404 or blank page. Seeing the Feynman page content means PASS.
